check.description: Run formatting/linting with Biome and type-check the source code with Deno.

check:biome.description: Format, lint, and organize imports in the src directory using Biome.

check:deno.description: Perform full TypeScript type-checking on the src directory.

test.description: Run all tests using Deno’s built-in test runner.

test:publish.description: Validate that the package can be published without errors.

ncu.description: Update npm dependencies in package.json to their latest compatible versions.
